name: test_query_sales
description:
查询销售额."""
        response = mock_api_client.post("/api/v1/query", json={

# =============================================================================
# Phase 3: Precise DSL tests (via /query/execute with exact DSL)
# =============================================================================

class TestPreciseQueries:
    """Test precise DSL execution to verify data correctness.

    These tests bypass the keyword-based mock DSL generator and directly
    provide exact DSL to the /query/execute endpoint.
    """

    def test_execute_sales_by_region(self, mock_api_client):
        """按地区汇总销售额.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.region_code AS region, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.region_code
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_sales_by_category
description: 按品类汇总销售额.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.category AS category, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.category
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_phone_orders_east_china
description: 华东地区手机品类的订单量.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.category AS category, count(order_fact.id) AS order_count 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code = 'HD' AND order_fact.category = '手机' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.category
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_online_channel_avg_value
description: 线上渠道客单价.
sql:
SELECT avg(order_fact.pay_amount) AS avg_order_value 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.channel_code = 'online' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_sales_by_brand
description: 按品牌汇总销售额.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.brand AS brand, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.brand
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_vip_customer_sales
description: VIP客户消费金额.
sql:
SELECT sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.customer_type = 'VIP' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_order_count_by_channel
description: 按渠道统计订单量.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.channel_code AS channel, count(order_fact.id) AS order_count 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.channel_code
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_top_products_by_sales
description: 销售额最高的10个产品.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_customer_type_avg_value
description: 新客和老客客单价对比.
sql:
SELECT order_fact.customer_type AS customer_type, avg(order_fact.pay_amount) AS avg_order_value 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.customer_type
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_tenant_isolation_u001
description: u001 (t001) should only see t001 data.
sql:
SELECT sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_tenant_isolation_u002
description: u002 (t002) should only see t002 data.
sql:
SELECT sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HB', 'XN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't002'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_with_semantic_resolution
description: Test that semantic resolution works (region -> region_code, etc.).
sql:
SELECT order_fact.region_code AS region, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code = 'HD' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.region_code
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_multi_table_join_supplier_sales
description: 跨表 JOIN: order_fact -> product_dim -> supplier_dim, 按供应商统计销售额.
sql:
SELECT s.supplier_name AS supplier_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact JOIN product_dim AS p ON order_fact.product_id = p.product_id JOIN supplier_dim AS s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY s.supplier_name
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_multi_table_join_customer_sales
description: 跨表 JOIN: order_fact -> customer_dim, 按客户名称统计销售额.
sql:
SELECT c.customer_name AS customer_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact JOIN customer_dim AS c ON order_fact.customer_id = c.customer_id 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY c.customer_name
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_region_dim_join_tier_sales
description: 跨表 JOIN: order_fact -> region_dim, 按城市等级统计销售额.
sql:
SELECT r.tier_level AS tier_level, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact JOIN region_dim AS r ON order_fact.region_code = r.region_code 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY r.tier_level
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_inventory_by_warehouse_type
description: 库存数据源: 按仓库类型统计总库存量.
sql:
SELECT inventory_fact.warehouse_type AS warehouse_type, sum(inventory_fact.stock_quantity) AS total_stock 
FROM inventory_fact 
WHERE inventory_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND inventory_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY inventory_fact.warehouse_type
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_execute_supplier_credit_a_sales
description: 跨表 JOIN + 过滤: 信用等级为A的供应商的销售额.
sql:
SELECT s.supplier_name AS supplier_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact JOIN product_dim AS p ON order_fact.product_id = p.product_id JOIN supplier_dim AS s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id 
WHERE s.credit_rating = 'A' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY s.supplier_name
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_pagination_limit_offset

WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY sales_amount DESC

name: test_ascending_order

FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.category ORDER BY sales_amount ASC
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_like_filter

FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.product_name LIKE '%iPhone%' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_numeric_comparison_filters

FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.pay_amount > 5000 AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_not_equal_filter

WHERE order_fact.category != '手机' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.category

name: test_all_aggregations

WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001'

WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.customer_type ORDER BY sales_amount DESC

name: test_region_tier_sales_analysis
description: 地区维度 JOIN：按城市等级统计销售额.
sql:

FROM order_fact JOIN date_dim AS d ON order_fact.date_id = d.date_id

FROM order_fact JOIN product_dim AS p ON order_fact.product_id = p.product_id JOIN supplier_dim AS s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY s.credit_rating, s.supplier_name ORDER BY s.credit_rating ASC, sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 8 OFFSET 0

SELECT inventory_fact.brand AS brand, inventory_fact.category AS category, sum(inventory_fact.stock_quantity) AS total_stock, avg(inventory_fact.days_of_supply) AS avg_days_supply 
FROM inventory_fact 
WHERE inventory_fact.days_of_supply < 30 AND inventory_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND inventory_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY inventory_fact.brand, inventory_fact.category ORDER BY avg_days_supply ASC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_total_balance
description: 查询总余额.
sql:
SELECT sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_customer_count
description: 查询客户数量.
sql:
SELECT count(t_cif_base.cif_no) AS customer_count 
FROM t_cif_base 
WHERE t_cif_base.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_account_count
description: 查询账户数量.
sql:
SELECT count(t_acct_main.acct_no) AS account_count 
FROM t_acct_main 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_transaction_count
description: 查询交易笔数.
sql:
SELECT count(t_txn_dtl.txn_seq_no) AS txn_count 
FROM t_txn_dtl 
WHERE t_txn_dtl.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_balance_by_account_type
description: 按账户类型统计余额.
sql:
SELECT t_acct_main.acct_type_cd AS account_type, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY t_acct_main.acct_type_cd
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_customers_by_risk_level
description: 按风险等级统计客户数.
sql:
SELECT t_cif_base.risk_lvl_cd AS risk_level, count(t_cif_base.cif_no) AS customer_count 
FROM t_cif_base 
WHERE t_cif_base.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY t_cif_base.risk_lvl_cd
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_txn_by_channel
description: 按渠道统计交易金额.
sql:
SELECT ch.chl_nm AS channel_name, sum(t_txn_dtl.txn_amt) AS txn_amount 
FROM t_txn_dtl JOIN t_chl_mapping AS ch ON t_txn_dtl.chl_cd = ch.chl_cd 
WHERE t_txn_dtl.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY ch.chl_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_balance_by_org
description: 按机构统计余额（JOIN t_org_hier）.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_acct_main.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_current_account_balance
description: 查询活期存款余额.
sql:
SELECT sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main 
WHERE t_acct_main.acct_type_cd = '01' AND t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_normal_customers
description: 查询正常状态客户.
sql:
SELECT count(t_cif_base.cif_no) AS customer_count 
FROM t_cif_base 
WHERE t_cif_base.cust_sts_cd = '01' AND t_cif_base.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_cny_accounts
description: 查询人民币账户.
sql:
SELECT sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main 
WHERE t_acct_main.ccyc_cd = 'CNY' AND t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001'
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_multi_metric_multi_dimension_accounts
description: 多指标 + 多维度：各机构各账户类型的余额和账户数.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, t_acct_main.acct_type_cd AS account_type, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance, count(t_acct_main.acct_no) AS account_count, avg(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS avg_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_acct_main.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm, t_acct_main.acct_type_cd
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_join_txn_with_channel_and_type
description: 多表 JOIN：交易流水 + 渠道 + 交易类型.
sql:
SELECT ch.chl_nm AS channel_name, tt.txn_type_nm AS transaction_type_name, count(t_txn_dtl.txn_seq_no) AS txn_count, sum(t_txn_dtl.txn_amt) AS txn_amount 
FROM t_txn_dtl JOIN t_chl_mapping AS ch ON t_txn_dtl.chl_cd = ch.chl_cd JOIN t_txn_type_dict AS tt ON t_txn_dtl.txn_type_cd = tt.txn_type_cd 
WHERE t_txn_dtl.rvsl_flg = '0' AND t_txn_dtl.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY ch.chl_nm, tt.txn_type_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_agreement_with_product_join
description: 合约 + 产品 JOIN：各产品类目的持有金额.
sql:
SELECT p.prod_lvl1_nm AS product_level1_name, p.prod_lvl2_nm AS product_level2_name, sum(t_cust_prod_agt.hold_amt) AS product_hold_amount, count(t_cust_prod_agt.agt_no) AS agreement_count 
FROM t_cust_prod_agt JOIN t_prod_info AS p ON t_cust_prod_agt.prod_cd = p.prod_cd 
WHERE t_cust_prod_agt.agt_sts_cd = '01' AND t_cust_prod_agt.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY p.prod_lvl1_nm, p.prod_lvl2_nm ORDER BY product_hold_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_inflow_outflow_comparison
description: 流入流出对比：各渠道的流入和流出金额.

metrics.field: CASE WHEN dr_cr_flg = '2' THEN txn_amt ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN dr_cr_flg = '1' THEN txn_amt ELSE 0 END

sql:
SELECT ch.chl_nm AS channel_name, sum(CASE WHEN dr_cr_flg = '2' THEN txn_amt ELSE 0 END) AS inflow_amount, sum(CASE WHEN dr_cr_flg = '1' THEN txn_amt ELSE 0 END) AS outflow_amount 
FROM t_txn_dtl JOIN t_chl_mapping AS ch ON t_txn_dtl.chl_cd = ch.chl_cd 
WHERE t_txn_dtl.rvsl_flg = '0' AND t_txn_dtl.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY ch.chl_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_top_accounts_by_balance
description: TOP N 查询：余额最高的账户.
sql:
SELECT c.cust_nm AS customer_name, t_acct_main.acct_type_cd AS account_type, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_cif_base AS c ON t_acct_main.cif_no = c.cif_no 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY c.cust_nm, t_acct_main.acct_type_cd ORDER BY total_balance DESC
 LIMIT 5 OFFSET 0

name: test_multi_filter_customer_accounts
description: 多条件过滤：正常状态 + 人民币 + 活期.
sql:
SELECT c.cust_nm AS customer_name, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance, count(t_acct_main.acct_no) AS account_count 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_cif_base AS c ON t_acct_main.cif_no = c.cif_no 
WHERE t_acct_main.acct_sts_cd = '01' AND t_acct_main.ccyc_cd = 'CNY' AND t_acct_main.acct_type_cd = '01' AND t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY c.cust_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_customer_with_risk_and_org
description: 客户 + 机构 JOIN：各机构各风险等级的客户数.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, t_cif_base.risk_lvl_cd AS risk_level, count(t_cif_base.cif_no) AS customer_count 
FROM t_cif_base JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_cif_base.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE t_cif_base.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm, t_cif_base.risk_lvl_cd
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_b001_only_sees_beijing
description: b001 只能看到北京分行的数据.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_acct_main.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE o.org_nm IN ('北京分行', '北京朝阳支行', '北京海淀支行') AND t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_b002_only_sees_shanghai
description: b002 只能看到上海分行的数据.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_acct_main.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE o.org_nm IN ('上海分行', '上海浦东支行', '上海徐汇支行') AND t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_b003_sees_all_orgs
description: b003 无行级限制，可以看到所有机构.
sql:
SELECT o.org_nm AS org_name, sum(t_acct_main.acct_bal) AS total_balance 
FROM t_acct_main JOIN t_org_hier AS o ON t_acct_main.org_cd = o.org_cd 
WHERE t_acct_main.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY o.org_nm
 LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_sales
description: 查询销售额.
question: 查询销售额
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_sales_by_category
description: 查询各品类的销售额.
question: 查询各品类的销售额
sql:
SELECT order_fact.category AS category, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact JOIN product_dim AS p ON order_fact.product_id = p.product_id 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.category ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_order_count
description: 查询订单量.
question: 查询订单量
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, count(order_fact.id) AS order_count 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY order_count DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_region_filter
description: 查询华东地区的销售额.
question: 查询华东地区的销售额
sql:
SELECT order_fact.region_code AS region, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code = 'HD' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.region_code ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_channel_filter
description: 查询线上渠道的销售额.
question: 查询线上渠道的销售额
sql:
SELECT order_fact.channel_code AS channel, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.channel_code = 'online' AND order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.channel_code ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_product_top_sales
description: 查询销售额最高的产品.
question: 查询销售额最高的产品
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.pay_amount) AS sales_amount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_avg_order_value
description: 查询客单价.
question: 查询客单价
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, avg(order_fact.pay_amount) AS avg_order_value 
FROM order_fact JOIN product_dim AS p ON order_fact.product_id = p.product_id 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_gmv
description: 查询GMV.
question: 查询GMV
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.order_amount) AS gmv 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY gmv DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_total_quantity
description: 查询销量.
question: 查询销量
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.quantity) AS total_quantity 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

name: test_query_discount
description: 查询优惠总额.
question: 查询优惠总额
sql:
SELECT order_fact.product_name AS product_name, sum(order_fact.discount_amount) AS total_discount 
FROM order_fact 
WHERE order_fact.region_code IN ('HD', 'HN') AND order_fact.tenant_id = 't001' GROUP BY order_fact.product_name ORDER BY total_discount DESC
 LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0
